queries.question: List the theater company and producers for all plays and arrange them by ascending premiere date.
queries.sql: SELECT theater_company, producer FROM Stage_Play ORDER BY year_premiered ASC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?theater_company ?producer WHERE {
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:theater_company ?theater_company .
  ?stage_play p:producer ?producer .
  ?stage_play p:year_premiered ?year_premiered_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?year_premiered_o)

queries.question: List the theater company for all plays and arrange them by ascending premiere date.
queries.sql: SELECT theater_company FROM Stage_Play ORDER BY year_premiered ASC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?theater_company WHERE {
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:theater_company ?theater_company .
  ?stage_play p:year_premiered ?year_premiered_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?year_premiered_o)

queries.question: What theater companies made all the dramas?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?theater_company WHERE {
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:theater_company ?theater_company .
  ?stage_play p:genre ?genre_f .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Drama")
}

queries.question: Show me who staged all the performances and arrange them by premiere date in ascending order.
queries.sql: SELECT producer FROM Stage_Play ORDER BY year_premiered ASC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?producer WHERE {
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:producer ?producer .
  ?stage_play p:year_premiered ?year_premiered_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?year_premiered_o)

queries.question: What theater companies and producers made all the dramas?
queries.sql: SELECT theater_company, producer FROM "Stage_Play" WHERE genre = 'Drama';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?theater_company ?producer WHERE {
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:theater_company ?theater_company .
  ?stage_play p:producer ?producer .
  ?stage_play p:genre ?genre_f .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Drama")
}

queries.question: What producers made all the dramas?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?producer WHERE {
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:producer ?producer .
  ?stage_play p:genre ?genre_f .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Drama")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me who staged all the performances and arrange them by premiere date in ascending order.
Who produced all the dramas?
